CS student actively seeking networking and security internships or entry-level roles. I enjoy CTF challenges, low-level systems work, and building security tooling from scratch.

🔬 02 — PROJECTS
001
CNetworking

Packet Sniffer

Raw socket-based network analyser in C. Captures and decodes TCP/IP, UDP, and ICMP headers in real time with a colour terminal dashboard.

C · libpcapgithub →
002
PythonSecurity

Port Scanner

Multi-threaded TCP/UDP port scanner with service fingerprinting and OS detection heuristics. Outputs structured JSON for pipeline integration.

Python · socketgithub →
003
JavaCrypto

Secure Chat App

End-to-end encrypted messaging using RSA key exchange and AES-256. Built from scratch without third-party crypto libraries.

Java · javax.cryptogithub →
004
CSystems

Firewall Rule Engine

Lightweight user-space firewall using netfilter queue. Evaluates inbound packets against a configurable rule set and logs policy decisions.

C · netfiltergithub →
005
PythonForensics

Log Anomaly Detector

Parses syslog and Apache access logs to flag brute-force attempts, scanning behaviour, and unusual traffic spikes.

Python · pandasgithub →
006
JavaNetworking

Mini DNS Resolver

Recursive DNS resolver built to RFC spec. Handles A, AAAA, MX, and CNAME records with response caching and TTL management.

Java · NIOgithub →
